downtime_activities.note: All activities share the same mechanical framework. Each day: make a progress check, then roll 1d6 (1=complication from d8 table, 6=opportunity from d6 table, 2-5=nothing). When progress_required is reached, calculate the final quality score and look up the resolution outcome.

mechanical_effect_types.note: Reference for all possible mechanical_effect.type values used in complications and opportunities.

types.description: Reduce total progress required by value
Spend value GP (may be a dice expression like '1d4*5')
Take value damage (may be a dice expression)
Next check DC increases by value
Today's successful check counts as double progress
Add value to final resolution score
Next successful check counts as +2 progress instead of +1
No mechanical effect — handled via Oracle

activities.name: Crafting Mundane Items
activities.description: The character spends time crafting a nonmagical item using artisan's tools. Each day of work produces measurable progress toward completion.
requirements: Proficiency with the relevant Artisan's Tools
Materials costing half the item's market value

failure_by_5.note: Material waste: lose ~10-20% of material cost

entries.name: Material Imperfection
entries.description: Part of the materials turns out to be flawed or substandard.

entries.name: Tool Misalignment
entries.description: Your tools loosen, jam, or require readjustment mid-work.

entries.name: Fatigue Setback
entries.description: Exhaustion slows your hands and dulls your focus.

entries.name: Environmental Disruption
entries.description: Dust, humidity, wind, heat, or noise disrupts the work.

entries.name: Unexpected Visitor
entries.description: An NPC interrupts the work — a customer, an official, an old contact.

mechanical_effect.note: Use Oracle to determine who and why

entries.name: Minor Injury
entries.description: Small cuts, burns, or bruises slow you down.

entries.name: Supply Shortage
entries.description: A key component is missing or runs out sooner than expected.

entries.name: Creative Block
entries.description: A moment of frustration or indecision breaks your rhythm.

entries.name: Inspired Moment
entries.description: A brilliant idea accelerates the work.

entries.name: Perfect Conditions
entries.description: Light, temperature, and focus align perfectly.

entries.name: Efficient Technique
entries.description: You discover a faster way to work.

entries.name: Unexpected Help
entries.description: An apprentice, friend, or passing artisan lends a hand.

entries.name: High-Quality Materials
entries.description: The materials respond better than expected — less waste, cleaner work.

entries.name: Breakthrough Insight
entries.description: You understand something new about the process.

positive_modifiers.description: +1 for each Opportunity used
+2 if no Complications occurred
+1 if superior quality tools were used
+1 if the character has proficiency with the relevant tools

negative_modifiers.description: -1 for each unresolved Complication
-2 if materials were wasted more than once
-1 if the character was injured during crafting

outcomes.name: Poor Quality
outcomes.description: The item works but has visible flaws or structural weaknesses.

outcomes.name: Standard Quality
outcomes.description: A solid, functional item — exactly as described in the rules.

outcomes.name: Fine Quality
outcomes.description: Exceptionally well made. Sought after by discerning buyers.

outcomes.name: Masterwork
outcomes.description: A remarkable piece of craftsmanship. Can serve as the base for a magic item.
outcomes.bonus: Can be used as the base item for magic item crafting

activities.name: Crafting Magic Items
activities.description: The character spends time imbuing an item with magical energy through ritual, rare materials, and focused arcane or divine work. This is slower, riskier, and more demanding than mundane crafting.
requirements: The formula or recipe for the specific magic item
Proficiency with the relevant Artisan's Tools
Rare materials (cost varies by rarity — see variant)

entries.name: Arcane Backlash
entries.description: Unstable magic surges through the item and into you.

entries.name: Ritual Disruption
entries.description: A mispronounced word or broken focus unravels an hour of work.

entries.name: Material Resonance Failure
entries.description: A component reacts poorly to the enchantment process and must be replaced.

mechanical_effect.note: rarity_tier: Common=1, Uncommon=2, Rare=3, Very Rare=4, Legendary=5

entries.name: Ambient Interference
entries.description: Weather, planar energy, or emotional turmoil disrupts the ritual.

entries.name: Essence Drift
entries.description: The magic begins to wander beyond your control.

entries.name: Spiritual Recoil
entries.description: Your mind strains under the weight of channeling so much magical energy.

entries.name: Unwanted Attention
entries.description: A magical flare attracts a curious creature, a wandering spirit, or a rival mage.

mechanical_effect.note: Use Oracle to determine what arrives

entries.name: Catalyst Instability
entries.description: A key catalytic component destabilizes and must be partially replaced.

entries.name: Arcane Clarity
entries.description: A moment of perfect focus — the magic flows exactly where you want it.

entries.name: Resonant Harmony
entries.description: The materials and the magic align beautifully.

entries.name: Energetic Synergy
entries.description: The magic flows with unusual efficiency today.

entries.name: External Inspiration
entries.description: A mentor, a spirit, or a vivid memory guides your hand at a critical moment.

entries.name: Efficient Channeling
entries.description: You find a more elegant way to bind the enchantment — less work needed.

entries.name: Breakthrough Insight
entries.description: You grasp a deeper principle of the enchantment that improves the final result.

positive_modifiers.description: +1 for each Opportunity used
+2 if no Complications occurred
+1 if proficient with the crafting tool
+1 if proficient in Arcana
+1 if a rare component worth ≥ 50 gp × rarity tier was used
+2 if the crafter has a relevant class feature (spellcasting, Infuse Item, etc.)
+2 if crafting took place in a sanctum, forge, or place of power

negative_modifiers.description: -1 for each unresolved Complication
-2 if magical instability caused Progress loss more than once
-1 if the crafter suffered Exhaustion during crafting
-1 if crafting was interrupted for more than 2 consecutive days
-2 if a required component was substituted with a cheaper alternative

outcomes.name: Flawed Magic
outcomes.description: The item works but has an unpredictable quirk or minor drawback. Use Oracle to determine the flaw.

outcomes.name: Standard Magic Item
outcomes.description: The item functions exactly as described in the rules.

outcomes.name: Enhanced Item
outcomes.description: The item has a minor cosmetic or functional bonus beyond its base properties.

outcomes.name: Masterwork Enchantment
outcomes.description: The item gains a small additional property or becomes permanently attuned to its crafter.
outcomes.note: Additional minor property or permanent crafter attunement

activities.name: Animal Training
activities.description: The character trains a beast companion to follow commands, perform tricks, serve in combat, or act as a mount. Training is a relationship — it can go forward or backward depending on how it unfolds.
requirements: The animal must be in the character's possession
Proficiency in Animal Handling OR a hired trainer (cost: 1 gp/day)

progress_check.note: DC is based on the creature's natural temperament, not the training goal.

training_goals.name: Basic Obedience
training_goals.description: Sit, stay, follow, come when called.

training_goals.name: Simple Tricks
training_goals.description: Fetch, roll over, heel, perform a defined behavior on command.

training_goals.name: Combat Training
training_goals.description: Attack on command, defend its handler, hold position under fire.

training_goals.name: Mount Training
training_goals.description: Accept a rider, respond to leg and rein commands, stay calm in combat.

training_goals.name: Advanced Behaviors
training_goals.description: Guard a location, track a specific scent, scout ahead and return.

entries.name: Skittish Reaction
entries.description: The creature panics at a sudden noise, smell, or movement and bolts or cowers.

entries.name: Aggressive Outburst
entries.description: The creature lashes out unexpectedly — at you, at a bystander, or at another animal.

entries.name: Environmental Distraction
entries.description: Loud noise, a predator nearby, weather, or an unusual smell makes the creature unable to focus.

entries.name: Loss of Focus
entries.description: The creature becomes bored, stubborn, or overstimulated and refuses to engage.

entries.name: Minor Injury
entries.description: The creature hurts itself slightly — a twisted leg, a scratch, a bruise.

mechanical_effect.note: The creature must rest; no check tomorrow

entries.name: Food Shortage
entries.description: The creature is hungry and distracted. Training without proper motivation is useless today.

mechanical_effect.note: Spend on treats or quality feed to continue

entries.name: Territorial Behavior
entries.description: The creature refuses to train in the current area — too many smells, too much noise, wrong ground.

mechanical_effect.note: Lose half a day relocating to a better spot

entries.name: Bond Strain
entries.description: A miscommunication or a moment of fear damages the trust you have built.

entries.name: Breakthrough Moment
entries.description: The creature suddenly understands — something clicks and it performs perfectly.

entries.name: Trust Surge
entries.description: A quiet bonding moment — the creature chooses to stay close, to watch you, to respond.

entries.name: Environmental Harmony
entries.description: The setting is perfect — familiar, calm, exactly right for this kind of work.

entries.name: Instinct Alignment
entries.description: The behavior you are training aligns perfectly with the creature's natural instincts.

entries.name: Helpful Bystander
entries.description: A stablehand, a druid passing through, or a local ranger offers a useful tip or a helping hand.

entries.name: Food Motivation
entries.description: You find exactly the right treat — the creature responds with unusual enthusiasm.

positive_modifiers.description: +1 for each Opportunity used
+2 if no Complications occurred
+1 if the creature is naturally docile
+1 if the trainer has proficiency in Animal Handling
+1 if special feed or treats were used (at least 5 gp total)

negative_modifiers.description: -1 for each unresolved Complication
-2 if the creature injured the trainer
-1 if the creature is naturally aggressive
-1 if training was interrupted for more than 2 days

outcomes.name: Unstable Training
outcomes.description: The creature obeys most of the time but may disobey under stress, sudden loud noises, or when frightened.

outcomes.name: Standard Training
outcomes.description: The creature reliably performs the trained behavior under normal conditions.

outcomes.name: Strong Bond
outcomes.description: The creature gains +1 on checks related to the trained behavior and is harder to frighten away from its handler.

outcomes.name: Exceptional Companion
outcomes.description: The creature forms a deep bond: advantage on loyalty checks, faster future training, and one additional behavior it performs instinctively without command.
outcomes.note: Advantage on loyalty, instinctive behavior, faster future training

activities.name: Building / Construction
activities.description: The character oversees or directly participates in the construction of a structure. This is a long-term project that creates a permanent presence in the world.
requirements: A plot of land (owned, granted, or secured)
Permission from local authorities if applicable
Building materials and laborers (cost varies by project scale)

entries.name: Structural Weakness
entries.description: A beam, wall, or support fails and must be rebuilt from scratch.

entries.name: Worker Injury
entries.description: A helper or the builder is hurt — work stops while the situation is handled.

entries.name: Material Shortage
entries.description: A key material runs out or a supply delivery is delayed.

entries.name: Weather Interference
entries.description: Rain, wind, extreme heat, or cold makes safe construction impossible today.

entries.name: Tool Failure
entries.description: A key tool breaks, jams, or is stolen.

mechanical_effect.note: Spend to repair or replace, or lose the next check

entries.name: Inspection Trouble
entries.description: A local authority, guild representative, or landowner arrives demanding fees, permits, or explanations.

mechanical_effect.note: Use Oracle to determine what they want

entries.name: Foundation Shift
entries.description: The ground settles, shifts, or reveals a hidden cavity beneath the site.

entries.name: Unwanted Attention
entries.description: Bandits, curious beasts, or aggressive locals interrupt the work.

mechanical_effect.note: Use Oracle to determine the nature of the interruption

entries.name: Efficient Technique
entries.description: You or a worker discovers a faster, cleaner method of construction.

entries.name: Skilled Assistance
entries.description: A skilled carpenter, mason, or engineer arrives and works alongside you for the day.

entries.name: Perfect Conditions
entries.description: Weather, morale, and materials all align — a rare perfect day of work.

entries.name: Material Windfall
entries.description: You salvage usable materials from a nearby ruin, find a discount from a supplier, or receive a donation.

entries.name: Structural Insight
entries.description: A better understanding of load-bearing or layout improves both quality and speed.

entries.name: Community Support
entries.description: Locals pitch in — bringing food, labor, or materials out of goodwill or shared interest.

positive_modifiers.description: +1 for each Opportunity used
+2 if no Complications occurred
+1 if proficient with the relevant tools
+1 if high-quality materials were used (+10% cost)
+2 if skilled laborers were hired (+20% cost)
+1 if the site was especially suitable (solid ground, good access, favorable location)
+1 if the builder has a relevant background (Guild Artisan, Soldier, Sailor, etc.)

negative_modifiers.description: -1 for each unresolved Complication
-2 if structural setbacks occurred more than once
-1 if the project was interrupted for more than 2 consecutive days
-1 if cheap materials were used (-10% cost)
-2 if the site was unstable or hazardous

outcomes.name: Shoddy Construction
outcomes.description: The structure is functional but visibly flawed. Repairs will be needed within a season. Reduces property value.
outcomes.note: Functional but fragile, needs repairs soon

outcomes.name: Standard Construction
outcomes.description: Solid and reliable. Meets all expectations. The structure will stand for decades.

outcomes.name: Reinforced Build
outcomes.description: Better than expected. +10% property value, improved durability, and a minor structural benefit (e.g. thicker walls, better drainage).

outcomes.name: Masterwork Structure
outcomes.description: Exceptional craftsmanship. People notice. The structure becomes a local landmark and grants meaningful narrative or mechanical benefits to its owner.

activities.name: Buying a Specific Magic Item
activities.description: The character searches markets, guilds, black markets, collectors, and magical circles to locate a specific magic item. Each day of searching produces measurable progress toward finding a seller.
requirements: Access to a settlement or network where magic items can be traded
Gold for bribes, fees, or inflated prices (varies by rarity)

variants.name: Artifact
variants.note: Artifacts may require quests instead of gold.

entries.name: Price Gouging
entries.description: A seller demands an outrageous price or fee.

entries.name: Rival Buyer
entries.description: Someone else is also searching for the item.

entries.name: Suspicious Activity
entries.description: Authorities or guilds question your intentions.

entries.name: False Lead
entries.description: A promising rumor turns out to be fake.

entries.name: Black Market Trouble
entries.description: Criminals demand a 'finder's fee' or threaten you.

entries.name: Counterfeit Item
entries.description: You waste time verifying authenticity.

entries.name: Dangerous Contact
entries.description: A shady seller tries to scam or rob you.

entries.name: Reputation Damage
entries.description: Rumors spread that you're desperate or naive.

entries.name: Reliable Lead
entries.description: A trustworthy contact gives you a solid clue.

entries.name: Friendly Merchant
entries.description: A seller likes you or owes you a favor.

entries.name: Market Surge
entries.description: Several items appear on the market at once.

entries.name: Guild Assistance
entries.description: A faction or guild helps your search.

entries.name: Rumor Breakthrough
entries.description: You learn exactly who has the item.

entries.name: Negotiation Edge
entries.description: You gain leverage or insight for the final deal.

positive_modifiers.description: +1 for each Opportunity used
+2 if no Complications occurred
+1 if proficient in Persuasion
+1 if part of a guild or faction
+1 if ≥25gp × rarity tier spent in bribes
+2 if background helps (Noble, Guild Artisan, Charlatan, etc.)

negative_modifiers.description: -1 for each unresolved Complication
-2 if Progress was lost more than once
-1 if black market contacts were used
-1 if reputation was damaged
-2 if search took double the expected time

outcomes.name: Bad Deal
outcomes.description: You find the item, but at a steep price or with minor flaws.

outcomes.name: Standard Purchase
outcomes.description: You buy the item at normal market price.

outcomes.name: Good Bargain
outcomes.description: You secure a discount or bonus minor item.

outcomes.name: Exceptional Find
outcomes.description: You get a major discount, a rare variant, or a valuable contact.
outcomes.bonus: Gain a useful faction contact or future discount

activities.name: Running a Business
activities.description: The character manages a business such as a tavern, shop, forge, farm, guild hall, or other enterprise. Each week of management produces measurable progress toward completing a business cycle and determining profit or loss.
requirements: Ownership or management rights over a business
Operating costs paid weekly (varies by business size)

tool_options: Any tool relevant to the business

daily_event_roll.note: Business progress is typically weekly, but the same event structure applies.

entries.name: Unexpected Expenses
entries.description: Repairs, taxes, or fees strain the business.

entries.name: Staff Trouble
entries.description: A worker quits, slacks off, or causes problems.

entries.name: Supply Shortage
entries.description: A key ingredient or material becomes unavailable.

entries.name: Competition Surge
entries.description: A rival business steals customers.

entries.name: Crime or Vandalism
entries.description: The business suffers theft or damage.

entries.name: Regulatory Inspection
entries.description: Authorities demand compliance or paperwork.

entries.name: Bad Reputation Rumor
entries.description: A false rumor spreads among customers.

entries.name: Customer Incident
entries.description: A fight, accident, or scandal disrupts business.

entries.name: Boom Week
entries.description: Customer flow surges unexpectedly.

entries.name: Skilled Hire
entries.description: A talented worker joins the business.

entries.name: Market Trend
entries.description: Demand for your goods spikes.

entries.name: Influential Customer
entries.description: A noble, guildmaster, or adventurer visits.

entries.name: Efficient Operations
entries.description: You optimize workflow and reduce waste.

entries.name: Community Support
entries.description: Locals rally behind your business.

positive_modifiers.description: +1 for each Opportunity used
+2 if no Complications occurred
+1 if proficient with tools relevant to the business
+1 if proficient in Persuasion or Insight
+1 if business is in a high-traffic area
+2 if ≥50gp × business size invested
+1 if business has a positive reputation

negative_modifiers.description: -1 for each unresolved Complication
-2 if Progress was lost more than once
-1 if business is in a low-traffic area
-1 if staff turnover was high
-2 if cycle took double the expected time

outcomes.name: Loss
outcomes.description: The business loses money this cycle.

outcomes.name: Break Even
outcomes.description: The business makes a small profit or breaks even.

outcomes.name: Profit
outcomes.description: The business earns a solid profit.

outcomes.name: Booming Success
outcomes.description: The business thrives, gaining profit and reputation.
outcomes.bonus: Gain a reputation boost or expansion opportunity

activities.name: Skill Training
activities.description: The character trains with an instructor to learn a new language or gain proficiency with a tool. Each day of training produces measurable progress toward mastering the new skill.
requirements: Downtime days dedicated to focused study

tool_options: Any tool relevant to the training

variants.name: Gain Tool Expertise
variants.note: Requires existing proficiency with the tool.

entries.name: Difficult Lesson
entries.description: The day's material is unusually complex.

entries.name: Mental Fatigue
entries.description: Your mind struggles to absorb new information.

entries.name: Instructor Unavailable
entries.description: Your instructor is sick, busy, or absent.

entries.name: Miscommunication
entries.description: You misunderstand a key concept.

entries.name: Training Fees
entries.description: You must pay for materials, books, or instructor time.

entries.name: Frustration
entries.description: You hit a mental block and struggle to continue.

entries.name: Distraction
entries.description: External events disrupt your focus.

entries.name: Incorrect Technique
entries.description: You practice something incorrectly and must unlearn it.

entries.name: Clear Insight
entries.description: A concept suddenly clicks into place.

entries.name: Excellent Instruction
entries.description: Your instructor explains something perfectly.

entries.name: Study Breakthrough
entries.description: You discover a helpful mnemonic or technique.

entries.name: Focused Session
entries.description: You maintain perfect concentration.

entries.name: Helpful Materials
entries.description: You find a book or tool that accelerates learning.

entries.name: Instructor Praise
entries.description: Positive reinforcement boosts your confidence.

positive_modifiers.description: +1 for each Opportunity used
+2 if no Complications occurred
+1 if proficient in a relevant mental skill
+2 if instructor is exceptional or famous
+1 if extra gold was spent on books or tools

negative_modifiers.description: -1 for each unresolved Complication
-2 if Progress was lost more than once
-1 if the character suffered mental strain
-2 if training took double the expected time

outcomes.name: Incomplete Training
outcomes.description: You make progress but do not fully master the skill.
outcomes.note: May retry training with reduced progress required

outcomes.name: Basic Mastery
outcomes.description: You successfully learn the new language or tool proficiency.

outcomes.name: Strong Mastery
outcomes.description: You learn quickly and retain knowledge well.
outcomes.note: Gain proficiency and +1 bonus to first related check

outcomes.name: Exceptional Mastery
outcomes.description: You excel beyond expectations.
outcomes.bonus: Gain proficiency and advantage on the first major use

activities.name: Research
activities.description: The character studies books, scrolls, archives, magical texts, or interviews experts to uncover specific information. Each day of research produces measurable progress toward discovering the desired knowledge.
requirements: Access to a library, archive, sage, or magical repository
Any required fees or donations (varies by location)

tool_options: Any tool relevant to the research topic

failure_by_5.note: Misinterpretation or wasted time: lose 1 Progress

variants.name: Forbidden Research
variants.note: May require special permissions or quests.

entries.name: Misleading Source
entries.description: A text or expert gives incorrect or contradictory information.

entries.name: Mental Fatigue
entries.description: Long hours strain your focus.

entries.name: Restricted Access
entries.description: A section of the archive is temporarily closed.

entries.name: Confusing Text
entries.description: Dense or archaic writing slows your progress.

entries.name: Research Fee
entries.description: You must pay for access, copying, or expert consultation.

entries.name: Dangerous Knowledge
entries.description: You uncover something mentally or magically disturbing.

entries.name: Lost Time
entries.description: You chase a false lead or misfiled document.

entries.name: Scholarly Rival
entries.description: Another researcher interferes or competes with you.

entries.name: Clear Insight
entries.description: A sudden moment of clarity accelerates your understanding.

entries.name: Helpful Librarian
entries.description: A knowledgeable assistant guides you to the right sources.

entries.name: Rare Manuscript
entries.description: You gain access to a valuable or restricted text.

entries.name: Expert Consultation
entries.description: A sage or scholar provides crucial insight.

entries.name: Breakthrough Connection
entries.description: You connect multiple sources into a powerful insight.

entries.name: Scholarly Inspiration
entries.description: Your mind sharpens, revealing deeper truths.

positive_modifiers.description: +1 for each Opportunity used
+2 if no Complications occurred
+1 if proficient in Arcana or History
+1 if a sage or expert was hired
+2 if researching in a superior archive or magical library

negative_modifiers.description: -1 for each unresolved Complication
-2 if Progress was lost more than once
-1 if the character suffered mental strain or damage
-2 if research took double the expected time

outcomes.name: Fragmentary Knowledge
outcomes.description: You uncover only partial or unreliable information.
outcomes.note: May require additional research or quests

outcomes.name: Solid Understanding
outcomes.description: You learn the essential facts you were seeking.

outcomes.name: Deep Insight
outcomes.description: You uncover hidden details, rare lore, or advanced knowledge.

outcomes.name: Revelatory Discovery
outcomes.description: You uncover profound truths, forgotten secrets, or powerful revelations.
outcomes.bonus: May unlock new quests, spells, or unique narrative opportunities
